scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd gametap && npm run dev"
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:gametap: cd gametap && npm install && npm run build
scripts.prepare:firebase: rm -rf firebase-public && mkdir -p firebase-public/gametap && cp -R frontend/dist/* firebase-public/ && cp -R gametap/dist/* firebase-public/gametap/
scripts.build:hosting: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:gametap && npm run prepare:firebase
scripts.deploy: npm run build:hosting && npx firebase-tools deploy
